description: Operational backlog for the Bitacora v1 CLI and harness, derived from docs/spec.md.

features.name: cli_bootstrap
features.title: CLI bootstrap and packaging foundation
features.description: Create the TypeScript CLI entrypoint, command parser, executable binary, and bundled template resolution needed by the rest of v1.
features.scope: Bootstrap the executable surface and packaging only; no business commands or memory mutations yet.

features.name: init_core_layout
features.title: Init core and .bitacora layout
features.description: Implement the base init flow that materializes the filesystem layout, harness files, memory files, root AGENTS.md behavior, and top-level symlinks.
features.scope: Create the canonical project skeleton and preserve pre-existing AGENTS.md; exclude canonical agent content and adapter-specific generation details.

features.name: canonical_agents_and_codex_skill
features.title: Canonical agents and Codex skill seeds
features.description: Ship the canonical role markdown files and the canonical Bitacora skill used by adapters and Codex.
features.scope: Seed `.bitacora/agents/*` and `.bitacora/skills/bitacora-cli/SKILL.md`; exclude adapter merge logic and sync orchestration.

features.name: claude_adapter_permissions
features.title: Claude adapter and permissions merge
features.description: Generate Claude agent outputs, create the Claude skill symlink, and deep-merge deny rules into `.claude/settings.json` without clobbering user data.
features.scope: Implement Claude-specific adapter generation and deny-rule merge semantics only; do not add OpenCode generation or global sync orchestration.

features.name: opencode_adapter
features.title: OpenCode adapter
features.description: Generate the OpenCode adapter output from canonical agent definitions and register it in the adapter set.
features.scope: Implement OpenCode generation path and registration pattern only; exclude permission enforcement beyond what OpenCode supports in v1.

features.name: memory_storage_foundation
features.title: Memory storage foundation
features.description: Build the schema-validated storage layer for current, history, and lessons with locking, atomic writes, and shared validation behavior.
features.scope: Deliver file schemas, parsers, lock handling, and atomic persistence primitives; exclude command workflows and permission matrix UX.

features.name: current_and_session_flow
features.title: Current and session flow
features.description: Implement session lifecycle commands plus current-state commands with role-aware permission checks.
features.scope: Cover `session start`, `session end`, `current log`, `current status`, `current set`, and `current show`; exclude lessons/history browsing and search.

features.name: history_lessons_commands
features.title: History and lessons commands
features.description: Implement append/show flows for history and CRUD basics for lessons on top of the validated memory layer.
features.scope: Cover `history append --from-current`, `history show`, `lessons add`, `lessons update`, and `lessons list`; exclude search and doctor diagnostics.

features.name: lexical_search_commands
features.title: Lexical search commands
features.description: Add lexical search across lessons and history with the explicit v1 semantic-search rejection path.
features.scope: Implement case-insensitive substring search and `--semantic` exit behavior only; exclude embeddings or ranking systems.

features.name: sync_adapters
features.title: Sync adapters
features.description: Implement `bitacora sync` as the global regeneration command for all adapter outputs from canonical sources.
features.scope: Regenerate every adapter deterministically without changing unrelated files; exclude init skeleton creation and doctor diagnostics.

features.name: doctor_checks
features.title: Doctor checks
features.description: Implement `bitacora doctor` reporting for structure, schema validity, symlinks, adapter drift, permissions, and memory sizes.
features.scope: Add diagnostics and exit-code behavior for doctor only; exclude mutation commands and repair flows.
